task_completion.description: Send the INST COLLECT command with TYPE NORMAL
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenC3 Command Sender or CmdTlm Server interface showing the 'INST COLLECT' command with parameter 'TYPE NORMAL' being sent or successfully executed.
OpenC3 Telemetry Viewer or similar tool displaying the 'INST HEALTH_STATUS' packet, specifically showing values for TEMP1, TEMP2, TEMP3, TEMP4, COLLECT_TYPE, and CMD_ACPT_CNT.

task_completion.description: Determine the connection state of INST-related interfaces
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenC3 Interfaces tool or CmdTlm Server showing the connection state (e.g., CONNECTED, DISCONNECTED) of 'INST_INT'.

task_completion.description: Check for active limit violations on INST telemetry
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenC3 Limits Monitor, Telemetry Viewer, or out-of-limits indicator showing the limit states for INST telemetry items.

task_completion.description: Save the handover report to the specified Desktop path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal window, or file manager showing a file named 'handover_report.json' located at '/home/ga/Desktop/'.

task_completion.description: Handover report contains all required top-level JSON keys
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'handover_report.json' visible on screen showing the exact keys: 'shift_end_time', 'operator', 'satellite_health', 'interfaces', 'limit_violations', 'commands_sent', and 'next_shift_recommendations'.

task_completion.description: Handover report contains correct nested data structures
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JSON contents show 'satellite_health' as an object with temp1-4, collect_type, and cmd_acpt_cnt; 'interfaces' as an array of objects with name/state; and 'limit_violations' as an array of objects with item/state.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the OpenC3 web interface to gather data
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the OpenC3 web application open in a browser, demonstrating genuine interaction with the satellite control software rather than bypassing it via scripts or hallucination.

integrity.description: Values in the JSON report match the actual telemetry seen in OpenC3
integrity.visual_evidence: The telemetry values (temperatures, counters, states) typed into the 'handover_report.json' file should correspond to the actual values visible in the OpenC3 Telemetry Viewer screenshots.

integrity.description: Limit violations and interface states are based on actual system state
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'interfaces' and 'limit_violations' arrays in the JSON report reflect the actual states shown in the OpenC3 GUI, rather than generic or placeholder data.
